## What

What does this PR change?

## Why

The motivation. Link the issue: `Closes #<issue>` (or `Refs #<issue>`).

## Spec sync

- [ ] No behavior change, or behavior change is reflected in `docs/specification/`
- [ ] `docs/ja/specification/` updated to match (if the English spec changed)

## Testing

How was this verified?

## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`type(scope): subject`)
- [ ] No organization-specific / proprietary information introduced
- [ ] CI is green
